MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by: Renita Mason. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Josephina Lopez is present.
Attorney Maureen Doran representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per plaintiff's attorney. The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
